calendar.matters:
Petition For Return Of Trust Assets Due To Breach Of Contract, Conversion, Fraud, Failure Of Bailment, Negligence And Request For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Contopoulos, via ZOOM, for Barbara Pitts, Petitioner; Mary Kate Kamka, via ZOOM, for Wells Fargo, N.A., Objector.

The court advises Mr. Contopoulos that in the court's opinion, there is an issue of venue and Mr. Contopoulos offers oral testimony to advocate for his position. Ms. Kamka offers her position that venue is not proper.

After additional discussion, the Petition is denied without prejudice.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
